Drifting in ice pack composed of block, brash, small and meduim floes in rotting condition in vicinity of 71 18.5N, 157 07W

2115 Set off a charge of twenty-four (24) One-half (1/2) lb. blocks of TNT to loosen or crack ice floe. 2145 Set off a charge of twelve (12) On-half (1/2) pound blocks of TNT to loosen or crack ice floe. No results.
